sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ الْأَخْبَارَ عَبْرَ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْهَاتِفِيَّةِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo ljudi čita vijesti putem brzih mobilnih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: Many people read news via fast mobile applications.

sentences.arabic: تَنْتَشِرُ الشَّائِعَاتُ وَالْأَخْبَارُ الْكَاذِبَةُ بِسُهُولَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي الْفَضَاءِ الرَّقْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Glasine i lažne vijesti se veoma lako šire u digitalnom prostoru.
sentences.translationEn: Rumors and fake news spread very easily in the digital space.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْوَاجِبِ التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ مَصْدَرِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ لِلْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Obavezno je provjeriti izvor vijesti prije nego što se podijeli s drugima.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to verify the source of the news before sharing it with others.
